cot_prefix: Okay, so I need to tackle this ethical dilemma about whether to tell a friend their baby has a severe, life-threatening condition. Let me start by understanding the situation. The user is a close friend of a couple who just had a baby. They know through reliable sources that the baby has a serious condition, but the couple isn't aware yet.
